channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pls remove, 23rd April
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People are using the car park to fly tip, 23rd April
item.description:
People are firstly dumping all manor or rubbish, wood, old doors etc and now as the premises has been empty for ages the car park is being used by delivery drivers who make noise at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Os 38 - 40 winchester Road, 23rd April
item.description:
A few years ago there was a tree o/s 38 - 40 Winchester Road. It was removed as the tree was dead and never replaced. The pavement has been covered with rubble where the tree was. Is another tree going to be planted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winchester Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking persistently on double yellow lines outside social club and at the corner of Eastnor Road, 23rd April
item.description:
This is not only endangering pedestrians it restricts the emergency services entering Eastnor Road. The pavement outside the social club was only last year widened and now the members of the social club seem to think its a parking pay.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unattended road works, 23rd April
item.description:
The Thames water roadworks on the A222 hasn’t had anyone working there for 10 days now, I’ve tried phoning number that Bexley council sent me but it does NOT have an option to find out WHY nobody is working there , when the disruption is causing chaos and priority should be to get this replacement of water mains have at least work being done, apart from 1 man sitting in a chair operating the temporary traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous application of graffiti on walls., 23rd April
item.description:
Continuous application of graffiti (silver paint) on the low level walls along the west side of Bush Road SE8/SE16 from the Lewisham Boundary, continuing along the Lower Road SE16 shops towards Surrey Quays station as of this morning (Thursday 23.04.26).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bush Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 23rd April
item.description:
Car been parked here wonkily and between two spaces since November last year, not moved once in 6 months and tyres are now flat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Rise, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pots holes “5inches” deep both directions, 23rd April
item.description:
This road has been reported before, multiple pots hole or craters as they've now got bigger. Both direction also throwing tarmac onto the pavement. Driving it smashed your suspension or being on a bus is teeth chattering. Any updates if these will be repair? Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 275, Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 23rd April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by number 15A Has been on the pavement taking up a lot of room for a few weeks now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yes, 23rd April
item.description:
More than two months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 224, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip on the pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
Limited access for pram with a child walking no lights on the skip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard hit by vehicle, needs replacing and footway needs repair, 23rd April
item.description:
Dangerous trip hazard, footway opened up -see photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-11, The Cut, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S shopping trolley corner of Sarre Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Only been dumped there recently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox in garden, 23rd April
item.description:
A fox has entered and died in the care home garden. It has been there for 2 days now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tiber Way, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tables, Chairs, and Signs on Pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
This restaurant is gradually taking over all the pavement in front of it with tables and chairs and a Sign board in the middle of where pedestrians walk. They have no consideration for the public. The restaurant is Mazlum at 10 Brompton Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Knightsbridge Green, Knightsbridge, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind victoria mews bins, 23rd April
item.description:
Large Wooden planks left behind victoria mews communal bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 broken slabs and tar mac is great crack/ lifting because of the roots of the tree., 23rd April

item.title: Blocking pathway, 23rd April
item.description:
Carpet and wood left in the alley way blocking path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raleigh Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd April
item.description:
This garage between ravine grove and kirkham street was cleared of rubbish that was accumulated over a few years.the clearance was done in last 2 weeks IT NEEDS BOARDING UP BECAUSE SOMEONE AS ALREADY DUMPED SOMETHING can this please be passed to the right dept . Thank you to stop the reaccurance of it being filled again . Let’s work together

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravine Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
